title: Statistical metrics and data regarding the verification of NCEP/GFS
author: Stergios kartsios
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset provides the output of the statististical verification procedure regarding the performance of the NCEP/GFS over selected regions in Africa.
